title: Salty CSS CLI Run Configuration
description: File .saltyrc.json is used to define projects and their configurations in json format for salty css cli.

info.description: Info about what the file is about.

defaultProject.description: The default project to be used.

dir.description: The root directory of the project. This is also used as the project name.

framework.description: The framework used by the project.

components.description: The directory for the components, relative to the project root.

configDir.description: Dir3ectorywhere the project configuration file is located, relative to the project root.

saltygenDir.description: Directory where the salty css files will be generated to, relative to the project root.

include.description: Optional glob patterns (relative to the project root) that limit which files the compiler scans. When set and non-empty, only matching files are compiled. When omitted, the whole project is scanned. Supports **, * and ?.

exclude.description: Optional glob patterns (relative to the project root) skipped by the compiler, in addition to the always-skipped node_modules and saltygen folders. Exclusions take precedence over include. Supports **, * and ?.
